settings.title: Now Pouring: Beans from Hillcrest Roastery, Three Streets Over
settings.excerpt: We have partnered with a neighbourhood roaster so your house cup never travels far.
settings.body:
Good coffee should not need a passport. Starting this month, our house blend comes from Hillcrest Roastery, a small operation just three streets away.

Roasting nearby means the beans reach us days off the roast rather than weeks, and it keeps our money in the neighbourhood. We think you will taste the difference in the cup.

Come try the new house blend on espresso or filter, and let us know what you think.
